title: Assistant Store Manager - Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Nagpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies:
Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies!
